title: India Decides : The Election Story
subTitle: India Decides : The Election Story

title: Say Yes to the Dress UK
subTitle: Debbie's twins prove hard to please when searching for the perfect dress; Kirstie tries to convince her mum to blow the budget on the dress of her dreams.

title: Halloween Wars
subTitle: The kitchen is set and the judges are ready for the world's best pumpkin carvers and cake and sugar artists; the show's crew travels across the U.S. -- and even venture out of the country -- to find the artists who have what it takes to compete.

title: Design Down Under
subTitle: A nurse with a busy lifestyle wants more function in her early 1900s home and calls Georgia and Richie in to help; as they begin to transform the cottage into the house of her dreams, she rethinks her wish list, creating strains on her budget.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: Jilly is riding to her wedding on a tractor, so her dress must be practical and elegant. Plus, indecisive Faye fears she will make the wrong choice again.

title: You, Me & My Ex
subTitle: Elodie has ex-rated questions about De'Andre and Rowan's relationship; Loren needs to share a game-changing secret with April; Chantel's cohabitating concerns are proving to be true; Alex explodes at his dad-chelor party.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Distraught Jenny no longer feels at home in India. Corey has a huge question to ask Evelin and Deavan and Jihoon have a traditional Korean wedding ceremony. Tiffany worries about Ronald's recovery when she and Daniel leave.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Bride Yvette goes from rugged to regal on a budget. Meanwhile, career woman Fatin has a clear idea of what she wants, but so does her expansive entourage.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Bride Khalidah wants a ball gown fit for a princess but her mother-in-law has other ideas. Daddy's girl Sarah can't seem to please her opinionated mother.

title: Mediterranean Life
subTitle: A couple move to Greece in search of a healthier and more relaxing lifestyle. She wants an apartment by the sea, but he wants a home with outdoor space.

title: Bahamas Life
subTitle: An Australian diving enthusiast wants a waterfront home in Nassau to keep his boat. Options include a renovated townhouse and open-plan beach house.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Doga instructor Mariah seeks a princess dress and wants her pup Coco to match! Jami is eloping to Paris and she needs a dress as magical as her destination.

title: Bakery Boss
subTitle: The owner of a Philadelphia bakery is still reeling from the loss of her father; business has slowed but the family refuses to make changes.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: Chefs Brooke Williamson and Cliff Crooks take the fight to the kitchen when they back contenders Javier Canteras and Emiliano Marentes to crack Bobby Flay.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: Hip-hop icon Lil Jon and Anne Burrell get Bobby Flay's kitchen turnt up with lights, beats and bottle service. Chefs Eva Pesantez and Robert Butts have Bobby on the VIP list ... to lose.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Robert Irvine receives a heartbreaking plea from Megan, who owns the BFE Bar and Grill in Waynesboro, Ga. with her husband, Mike.

title: 30-Minute Meals
subTitle: Rachael turns up the flavour on a steakhouse staple with her Sichuan steak au poivre with scallion mashed potatoes, which uses both Sichuan and traditional black peppercorns; her side of creamy mashed potatoes rounds out the steakhouse-inspired meal.

title: Chopped Sweets
subTitle: The competing chefs face an odd traditional Japanese sweet and a very large egg in the first basket. In the second basket, a weird ice cream is a treat compared to a certain animal's feet!

title: Chopped Sweets
subTitle: The chefs set out to make sweet dishes that are almost too pretty to eat. Fancy booze gets the competitors in a sparkly spirit in round two, and a gorgeous cake and a nostalgic candy are part of the puzzle for the finalists.

title: Outrageous Pumpkins
subTitle: The final five pull out all the stops when Damaris Phillips challenges them create their own superhero and superpower. The competitors depict a scene of the one and only DC's Batman facing off against one of his iconic enemies to save Gotham City.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: The country's choicest chicken dishes are highlighted; whether it's fried to golden perfection, smothered in gravy, stuffed in a taco, or topping a mound of crispy fries, chicken is one of the most versatile meats on the planet.

title: Chopped
subTitle: Something fried in the appetiser basket is a bit of a head-scratcher for the chefs, and the competitive fire is strong in the entrée round as they pull some curious fusion tacos from the basket and hustle to put together plates.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Featuring Hershey's `Kisses', a crepe and blini fusion, frog-shaped gummy candies and vanilla extract.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Featuring `tutti-frutti' candies, spinach potato latkes, gluten-free shirataki noodles and veggie crisps.

subTitle: Jilly is riding to her wedding on a tractor, so her dress must be practical and elegant. Plus, indecisive Faye fears she will make the wrong choice again.

title: Ridiculous Cakes
subTitle: My Little Pony comes to life in cake for one lucky girl's horse-themed birthday party; a cake proves to be a real bear for a Portland cake artist; things get messy when a cake artist uses only buttercream to decorate a cake.

title: Ridiculous Cakes
subTitle: A cake artist must deliver a wedding cake worthy of the famed Las Vegas Strip; a cake inspired by music hits a high note; sculpting a penguin out of cake for a child's birthday.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Chefs and food lovers reveal can't-miss dishes that aren't found on the menu, from salted caramel ice cream with Tabitha Brown in New York to the hottest, crunchiest bagel ever with Duff Goldman in Los Angeles.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Bride Samantha has mastered her weight-loss goals, but now she has to convince her mum to like the dress; a bride has a glam wedding in Puerto Rico.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: Brian and Mika help a family of four build a home that is just right, but when their plans fall through, they'll have to double down to not disappoint.

subTitle: The cast sits down with Shaun Robinson in NYC, with more couples together in person than ever before. A friend from Sarper's past joins the stage, everyone debates Josh and Lily's sex life, and one couple reveals a shocking break up.

subTitle: A couple sells their Alabama dream home to settle down on Greece's biggest island, Crete, with their three dogs. While she dreams of living in a traditional home with a pool and a sea view, he wants a house that's centrally located.

title: Bahamas Life
subTitle: Newlyweds are on the hunt for a home with a view in Great Exuma where they can escape when he returns from overseas military duty.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Cat and her fiancée Nicole both need dresses for their beach wedding. The challenge is to find two different gowns, that are still complementary.

title: So Freakin Cheap
subTitle: The Watsons prepare for Brittney's bachelorette party. Becky struggles to spend money buying furniture. The Tran family finds a pet photographer for Charisma's modelling portfolio shoot. The Claytons go to (free) therapy to save their marriage.

subTitle: Kardea Brown and actor Kevin Pollak try to crowd Bobby Flay out of his own kitchen, making room for chefs Carlos Anthony and Nelson German to score a win.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Chef Robert heads to Peppino's Ristorante Italiano in Oviedo, FL. He has his hands full with updating the decades-old menu, service and decor, as well as figuring out whether the owners' son is capable of running the business.

title: Girl Meets Farm
subTitle: Molly Yeh hosts her brunch club with a fun Halloween theme that includes cute costumes and frighteningly good food. She makes cyclops shakshuka focaccias, apple pancakes, Munster monster hash brown fingers and, for dessert, matcha macaroon monsters.

title: Chopped Sweets
subTitle: The picnic-themed competition starts with a large, juicy fruit in a fun form. A sweet salad and a savoury surprise show up in round two, and the finalists take on a refreshing drink and an unusual cake as the judges watch closely.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Succulent roast chicken from New York City; Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level with a cheesy, crunchy, gravy-drenched delight known as poutine; Duff Goldman is back in Baltimore slinging back some single-fry oysters.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Ali Khan devours an unbelievable dark truffle cake; Johnny Weir and Tara Lipinski indulge in an explosion of different chocolates in one luscious dessert; Scott Conant travels to Sin City to bet on a delicious chocolate mashup.

subTitle: The nation's most crave-worthy combinations are highlighted, from hearty biscuits and gravy and deliciously sinful macaroni and cheese to carb-happy spaghetti and meatballs and crispy fish and chips.

subTitle: It's Thanksgiving, and class is in session! Four beloved teachers get the chance to compete for the title of Chopped Champion. In the first Turkey Day basket, they find something fried and something shaped like a pumpkin.

subTitle: Chef Christian Petroni and actress Kate Flannery from The Office recruit chefs Josh Gale and Christian Ortiz for a hostile takeover of Bobby Flay's kitchen.

subTitle: Kalen Allen and Anne Burrell help chefs Paolo Calamai and Angelo Competiello show Roberto Flay how Tuscan cuisine is done in the old country.

subTitle: Newlyweds leave the snow and cold of Toronto to move to their honeymoon paradise of Oahu; he's intent on finding a place with a yard for their dog and room for a home office, while she is more concerned with a large lanai.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: Rob and Dana are successful entrepreneurs with hectic schedules, and are ready to find a mountain retreat where they can escape the demands of their busy lifestyle and unplug in the great outdoors.

subTitle: Chloe wants a modern dress she can share with her Instagram followers and bride Helena needs her wedding gown to work on her motorbike. Gok works his magic.

title: Sweet Empire: Winter Wars
subTitle: Host Wells Adams asks the six empires to channel childhood nostalgia as they create holiday showpieces inspired by vintage toys, with a requirement to incorporate movement; in a shake-up, the bottom empires are absorbed by the strongest teams.

title: Makeover by Monday
subTitle: Jenni Yolo remodels her friends' bedroom into an oasis that will provide a nice escape for the parents of four children. Jenni uses DIY-friendly techniques to transform the space including a custom wallpaper and a faux-denza.

subTitle: Kate Marker transforms a Cape Cod home in Illinois using classic designs.

subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: 90 Day: The Single Life
subTitle: Tyray meets another potential love match in New Orleans; John feels unsure about his future with Meghan; Natalie goes to a fertility clinic; Debbie's son, Julian, meets Ruben for the first time.

title: Virgins
subTitle: Deanne's date backfires when she only has eyes for the waiter. A potential date gets touchy-feely with Alex at tantra speed dating. Sonali's therapist gives her homework to do in bed. Rhasha enlists her mum and sister's help swiping right.
